title: LegacyAuth
description: Adds Authentication / Skins to Legacy Minecraft Versions
body:
# LegacyAuth

Lightweight mod that restores secure player authentication to legacy servers (e.g., **b1.2\_02**) where `online-mode` no longer works verifies identities and blocks name spoofing. Additionally, LegacyAuth restores player skins to Beta versions of Minecraft — allowing players to see proper skins once again.
 
## Setup 
**Authentication (Required on client and server):**
* Drop the JAR into the `mods/` folder.
* Join servers normally

**Skins (Client-only):**
* Only the client needs the mod installed to restore player skins.
* Works seamlessly even if the server does not have the mod.
